title: juncus digitatus
intro: Juncus digitatus, also known as the finger rush or finger rush grass, is a type of flowering plant in the rush family (Juncaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Juncus digitatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Juncus digitatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
